body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
* Improves clarity and consistency of docstrings (in Thermodynamics.jl style) in 0M and 1M 
* Recodes some calculations for improved GPU performance and stability (better guards against overflow/underflow/cancelations)
* Caches several constant gamma function evaluations to reduce GPU special function use/register pressure; increases performance of a few functions from 10% up to 2x
* Changes sedimentation velocity of cloud droplets from Chen x corr to Stokes velocity (should be relatively accurate for most small droplets)
* Fixes geometric factors:
  - Factor 2 between radius in 1M and diameter in Chen terminal velocity
  - Missing geometric factors in calculating radius from volume
 * Adds a simple velocity dispersion parameterization in the snow-rain accretion rate

## To-do

- Proposed task
-->

title: Docs, performance improvements, and a few corrections
